title: The Seducing Woods Trap
description: On pages 19–22, this part focuses on Judge, Unknown person #13, Unknown person #14, Unknown person #15, Unknown person #16, Sanji as The Straw Hats enter Big Mom’s strange territory while Sanji faces the Vinsmoke family and the arranged marriage.
scene: The group is pulled into Whole Cake Island’s strange living landscape, where the forest itself becomes an enemy.

dialogue.speaker: Judge
dialogue.text: Father!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #13
dialogue.text: It's dark and creepy!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #13
dialogue.text: Poelle a fire"

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: I feel nothing... but hatred towards this man.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #13
dialogue.text: "Wall"!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: O!!! Get out of the way, dumb- asses!!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #14
dialogue.text: BzzZZT!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #14
dialogue.text: "Electro- magnetic"

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #14
dialogue.text: "Shaff"!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #15
dialogue.text: You're quite sturdy!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #15
dialogue.text: You continue to amaze.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: to think that I'm looking at the same little boy from back then...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #15
dialogue.text: It's unfathom- able!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #15
dialogue.text: This is all so stupid...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: I just want to get this "tea party" business over with and leave this place as soon as possible.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Then I can finally leave this entire mess behind me.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: I let myself believe that maybe you lot had slightly changed for the better... but now I see that was wishful thinking... you're all much worse than before!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Get out of my sight, old man! I refuse to be affiliated with you in any way!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Say what you will...you can't deny that you have my blood running through your veins.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #15
dialogue.text: Don't get me wrong.

dialogue.speaker: Judge
dialogue.text: All of Germa's soldiers...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Wouldn't think twice about giving up their lives for us Vin- smokes.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: They are the ones who make up Germa's ultimate army!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Then why don't you use that ultimate army of yours to realize whatever idiotic ambitions you have?

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: "Taking over North Blue"? That's just fantastic! A perfect goal for an evil bunch led by the likes of you.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #16
dialogue.text: A sensi- BLE if not predictable statement.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: But with this alliance with big mom, that ambition of ours becomes a guaranteed reality!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: All we need from you is simple cooperation.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Do not forget, my initial request was to peacefully negotiate terms with you.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: It's true that I would love to have someone as powerful as big mom as an ally...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #16
dialogue.text: However, despite it being a mere marriage...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: I refuse to hand over one of my precious sons to that mentally deranged woman.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #16
dialogue.text: Remember to

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: And that's when it struck me... 'Yes that's right!' now that I think of it,

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: I used to have an extra "dud" laying around here somewhere.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: You are to serve as a means to an end, Sanji... Nothing more

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Just so we're both clear, I still and never will see a fool like you as a son of mine... not in the slightest.

summary: This section advances the Whole Cake Island storyline with 37 dialogue beats. Whole Cake Island becomes a hostile fairy-tale battlefield where Sanji’s rescue and Big Mom’s power are both unavoidable.
